lines.text: onboarding   pocket-agent 100 ¢r · authoring 100 ¢r — no manual minting
person asks  "reverse the words in 'life in time in ability'"
serves reverse_words? false → escalate to the market
task.post    macro_authoring (budget 15 escrowed; verified by the requester's own cases)
task.bid     authoring verified its solution locally first → confidence 0.95, price 12
settled      accepted — the hub ran the module against 2/2 cases → authoring-agent paid 12
install      owner approves scopes [none] for 'reverse_words' → yes
person asks  again → served LOCALLY: {"reversed":"ability in time in life"}
market       pocket-agent serves reverse_words for a stranger → settled
balances     pocket-agent 90 (100 − 12 skill + 2 earned) · authoring 112 (100 + 12 sold) · stranger 98 (100 − 2 hired)
escalation: true · installed: true · serves locally: true · market round: true · conservation: true
